message:
🧹 Centralize duplicate severity order maps into shared constants (#10352)

Replace 7+ inline severityOrder/SEVERITY_ORDER definitions with shared
ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER and VULN_SEVERITY_ORDER from types/alerts.ts.
Also fix CRD_CRD_DATA_FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS double-prefix from rebase.

Fixes #10346

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

+import { ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER } from '../../../types/alerts'

-                      const severityOrder = { critical: 0, warning: 1, info: 2 }
-                      return severityOrder[a.severity] - severityOrder[b.severity]
+                      return (ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER as Record<string, number>)[a.severity] - (ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER as Record<string, number>)[b.severity]
                     })

       switch (issueSortBy) {
         case 'severity':
-          compare = (SEVERITY_ORDER[a.severity] ?? 5) - (SEVERITY_ORDER[b.severity] ?? 5)
+          compare = ((ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER as Record<string, number>)[a.severity] ?? 5) - ((ALERT_SEVERITY_ORDER as Record<string, number>)[b.severity] ?? 5)
           break
